programmeDescription: A balanced 3-day programme built around compound barbell lifts for general fitness.
coachIntro: This programme builds strength and movement quality across three full-body sessions per week.
coachRationale: Three sessions allows full recovery between workouts while maintaining enough frequency to drive adaptation.
personalisationNotes: 3 training days selected — sessions are structured for full recovery between each.
Full-gym equipment gives access to barbell compounds.
General fitness goal: balanced push, pull, and squat patterns across the week.
weeklyProgression: Add 2.5 kg to squat and deadlift when all prescribed reps are completed. Add 1.25 kg to upper body lifts.

deloadWeek.guidance: Reduce load by 40% on all exercises. Focus on technique and movement quality.

workouts.briefDescription: Squat-led session with horizontal push and pull.
Hinge-led session with vertical push and pull.
Volume session — moderate load, higher reps.
